历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 16166 → 28410 → 23710 → 29369 → 31705, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. In 2022, due to a decrease in the provincial control line, there was a significant backward shift. After a slight recovery in 2023, it continued to move backward. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 31705. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for science (physics category) was 44 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 61 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, the plan increases to 78, an expansion of about 28% compared to 2025, reducing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 58th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national key universities. The reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 69th with average reviews, and short video exposure is at a lower-middle level. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Education is rated A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, with outstanding liberal arts disciplines, while science-related disciplines are relatively average in evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training majors is stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertain markings). Based on recent historical proportions, the physics category is estimated to be about 734,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has a certain regional appeal to Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 31705, the approximately 28% expansion in 2026 reducing competition, and the approximately 32% increase in physics category candidates in Henan Province intensifying competition, these two factors roughly offset each other. Negative reputation events may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 36906, with a range of 36406–37406.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36406–37406, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 36400), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Mathematics. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 37400), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a safe application.
